description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, set on a rectangular green lawn with sparse landscaping. The facade features large rectangular windows, a single-car garage, and a recessed main entryway with a small overhang. The structure is composed of two main volumes, with the upper story offset to one side, creating a stepped appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, light gray material, and the roof surfaces are flat, with some areas appearing to be accessible as terraces. The property includes paved walkways and a driveway leading to the garage. The landscaping is simple, with a few trees and shrubs placed around the perimeter.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a single-car garage, and minimalist landscaping on a rectangular lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, garage, and paved driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flat roof, upper story offset, and minimal window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a large terrace area, and simple backyard landscaping.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the stepped structure, additional windows, and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a small overhang, single door, and adjacent large window, accessed by a short walkway.
